# Compu Dynamics Modular

**Category:** Modular / Prefabricated, Containerized Data Centers, Edge and Micro Data Centers, Liquid Cooling, Construction and Integration
**Website:** https://cd-modular.com/

## Headline
Turnkey modular data center provider focused on AI, HPC, edge, high-density power, and liquid cooling deployments.

## Overview
Compu Dynamics Modular is relevant when buyers want vendor-neutral, turnkey modular infrastructure rather than piecing together multiple suppliers. The company stands out for combining modular delivery with AI/HPC density considerations, power integration, liquid cooling readiness, and actual execution-layer deployment support.

## Key capabilities
- turnkey modular data center delivery
- AI and edge deployment support
- high-density power and liquid cooling integration
- packaged execution for fast deployment programs

## Best fit for
- buyers seeking fast deployment without a greenfield build
- AI and HPC programs needing packaged modular capacity
- teams comparing turnkey modular partners versus general contractors
